title: QTC Awarded $1.7 Billion Veteran and Service Member Medical Disability Exam Contracts
text: RESTON, Va. , May 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- QTC Medical Services, Inc. (QTC), a Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) company, was recently awarded two prime contracts to provide medical disability examination services to both veterans and separating or retiring service members.

text: Live Audio Webcast Available on June 1, 2022, from 11:00 a.m. to 11:45 a.m.

title: Leidos Holdings: IT In The Defense Industry
text: Leidos is a $14 billion defense stock benefiting from the geopolitical tensions along with the overall defense industry. The balance sheet needs some improvement, the valuation could be better, but the potential rewards outweigh the risks.

title: NATO Awards Leidos Ballistic Missile Defense Contracts
text: RESTON, Va. , May 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE® 500 science and technology leader, has been awarded two internationally competed contracts by the NATO Communications and Information Agency (NCI Agency) to enhance the Alliance's ballistic missile defense (BMD) capabilities.

title: Here's Why Leidos Holdings Is Heading in the Right Direction
text: The defense contractor's first quarter wasn't a barn burner, but contract wins suggest that Leidos will soon grow strongly.

title: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Leidos Holdings' (LDOS) total revenues of $3,494 million in the quarter under consideration exceed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 3.2% and also increase 5.4% year over year

title: Leidos Holdings, Inc.'s (LDOS) CEO Roger Krone on Q1 2022Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Leidos Holdings, Inc.'s (NYSE:LDOS ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 3, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Roger Krone – Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Christopher Cage – Chief Financial Officer Stuart Davis – Investor Relations Conference Call Participants Peter Arment – Baird. Sheila Kahyaoglu – Jefferies.

title: Leidos (LDOS) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Leidos (LDOS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.04% and 3.19%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Leidos Holdings, Inc. Reports First Quarter Fiscal Year 2022 Results
text: Revenues of $3.5 billion, up 5% year-over-year Net Income of $177 million; Adjusted EBITDA of $358 million Diluted Earnings per Share of $1.25, or $1.58 on a non-GAAP basis Cash Flows from Operations of $93 million; Free Cash Flow of $65 million Net Bookings of $5.4 billion (book-to-bill ratio of 1.6) drive record backlog of $36.3 billion RESTON, Va., May 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LDOS), a FORTUNE 500® science and technology leader, today reported financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2022.
